task_description:
# AI-Powered Recommendation Generation

Implement the AI recommendation engine that analyzes brand visibility data and generates prioritized, actionable recommendations with impact scores.

## Rationale
This is a key differentiator vs competitors who only provide monitoring. Addressing the top competitor pain point: GEO tools lack actionable recommendations and optimization guidance.

## User Stories
- As a marketing manager, I want AI-generated recommendations so that I know exactly what to do to improve visibility
- As an executive, I want prioritized recommendations so that resources go to highest-impact activities

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] AI analyzes brand visibility data to identify improvement opportunities
- [ ] Recommendations prioritized by potential impact
- [ ] Each recommendation includes specific actionable steps
- [ ] Recommendations reference specific AI platforms and content gaps
